description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard features a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and landscaped greenery including trees and shrubs. The front of the house has a simple entryway with a single door and a small overhang, while the side includes a garage with a transparent sectional door and a driveway. The rooftop includes a green space with additional plants, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is clean-lined, with a focus on open spaces and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, white two-story house with large windows, a flat roof, a backyard pool, and landscaped greenery. Features include a garage, rooftop garden, and minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a flat roof, and a rooftop garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large horizontal windows, backyard pool, patio, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and extensive garden landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage with a transparent door, driveway, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist single door with a small overhang, no steps, and no decorative columns
